description_long: This is a modern, two-story house surrounded by a wooden fence and landscaped with grass, trees, and shrubs. The exterior features a flat roof, large rectangular windows, and a combination of white and wood-textured wall panels. The front entryway is accentuated by a wooden frame and a paved walkway, while the backyard includes a patio area and a small pool. The house has clean, geometric lines and an open, minimalist aesthetic, with a mix of private and communal outdoor spaces. The windows are arranged in both horizontal and vertical patterns, providing ample natural light to the interior.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, wood accents, and a fenced yard featuring a patio and pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, large windows, patio, pool, and wooden fencing with landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, upper balcony, and the continuation of the wooden fence and greenery.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying symmetrical window placement, a wide lawn, and the back patio area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the main door, wooden entry frame, and a clear view of the pool and side path.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a wooden frame, double doors, paved steps, and minimal overhang
